_comment: Notebook theme (PPT Outline View) — region schema (ADR-0045 Decision #2). v2.0.0: PPT transformation — ruled-paper removed, full style compatibility, visual region added, punchline slide type added.
name: notebook
description: PPT-style outline presentation with thumbnail navigation, transition effects, speaker script panel, and footer nav. Previously a ruled-paper notebook layout, now transformed to a clean PPT outline view while retaining its structured content density. Supports visual panel (right-side images).

rendering.navigation: thumbnail panel + footer bar — prev/next, transition mode selector, script toggle, timer

content_rules.notes: Outline-style layout supports structured content. Titles up to 30 chars. Max 4 bullets per slide. Visual images supported on right panel.

partial_styles.name: visual-heavy
partial_styles.reason: Full-bleed background images work for cover/divider; text-heavy outline slides better with classic/academic.

recommended_structure.notes: Divider slides mark chapter sections. Outline-style is well-suited for structured, information-dense presentations.

author: co-deck
